outOfScope: Destructive scanning, brute-force, or SQLMap automation

executiveSummary: Seven-phase OWASP-aligned assessment of NextHire production (websocket branch) found **no confirmed exploitable vulnerabilities** in injection, reflected XSS, authentication, or access-control testing. One **unconfirmed untested** stored-XSS path remains (JsonLd.tsx `</script>` breakout via job title). npm audit reported **0 moderate+ CVEs**. Ten recommendations (REC-001–REC-010) cover CSP, JSON-LD validation, auth hardening, mass-assignment strict schemas, and input-validation polish.

phaseSummaries.name: XSS
phaseSummaries.outcome: 70 reflected probes clean; stored XSS skipped — JsonLd risk untested

phaseSummaries.name: Security headers
phaseSummaries.outcome: HSTS, XFO, nosniff on frontend + API; frontend CSP gap

untestedRisks.title: Stored XSS via JSON-LD </script> breakout (unconfirmed, untested)
untestedRisks.note: Phase 3 stored XSS was skipped on production. JsonLd.tsx uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML + JSON.stringify, which does not neutralize </script> in strings. Exploitability is unverified but plausible if a company_admin can persist a malicious job title.
untestedRisks.remediation: Test stored payload on staging; escape U+003C in JsonLd output or use a safe JSON-LD serializer; reject/sanitize </script> in job titles on write.

recommendations.title: Add Content-Security-Policy on frontend
recommendations.remediation: Add a tuned CSP in next.config or nginx for nexthire.devqii.me; test with report-only mode first.

recommendations.title: Stored XSS via JSON-LD </script> breakout (unconfirmed, untested)
recommendations.note: Phase 3 stored XSS was skipped on production. JsonLd.tsx uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML + JSON.stringify, which does not neutralize </script> in strings. Exploitability is unverified but plausible if a company_admin can persist a malicious job title.
recommendations.remediation: Test stored payload on staging; escape U+003C in JsonLd output or use a safe JSON-LD serializer; reject/sanitize </script> in job titles on write.

recommendations.title: Remove token acceptance via query string
recommendations.remediation: Drop req.query.token in protect.middleware; use Authorization header or cookie only.

recommendations.title: Return 400 instead of 500 for invalid jobType filter values
recommendations.note: 7 probes returned 500 on malformed jobType — not confirmed SQLi; Prisma enum validation error
recommendations.remediation: Validate jobType against allowed enum before query; map to 400 Bad Request.

recommendations.title: Run authorize() before validate() on POST /jobs/create
recommendations.remediation: Reorder middleware: protect → authorize → validate to return 403 for wrong roles consistently.

recommendations.title: Add MFA for admin accounts
recommendations.remediation: TOTP or WebAuthn for company_admin and super_admin roles.

recommendations.title: Per-email login throttle (in addition to IP limit)
recommendations.remediation: Track failed attempts per email hash; temporary lockout after N failures.

recommendations.title: Strengthen WebSocket rate limiting
recommendations.remediation: Tighten ws event limits; consider per-user quotas after auth.

recommendations.title: Use Zod .strict() on company update/create schemas (mass assignment)
recommendations.note: company.routes.js uses .passthrough() on updateCompanySchema and createCompanySchema — extra JSON keys are not rejected.
recommendations.remediation: Replace .passthrough() with .strict() (or explicit .strip()) on company and profile Zod schemas so unknown fields cannot be mass-assigned.

owaspChecklist.name: Cryptographic failures
owaspChecklist.note: TLS, httpOnly refresh cookie, bcrypt passwords

owaspChecklist.name: Insecure design
owaspChecklist.note: Rate limits, token separation, generic auth errors

owaspChecklist.name: Security misconfiguration
owaspChecklist.note: Headers mostly good; frontend CSP gap

owaspChecklist.name: Authentication failures
owaspChecklist.note: Rate limits OK; MFA not implemented

owaspChecklist.name: Software/data integrity
owaspChecklist.note: No CI SAST/signing audit in this pass

owaspChecklist.name: Logging & monitoring
owaspChecklist.note: Admin logs exist; no SIEM review

owaspChecklist.name: SSRF
owaspChecklist.note: No user-controlled URL fetch endpoints found

limitations: Stored XSS write test not performed on production — JsonLd </script> path unconfirmed (see REC-002).
Credential-stuffing / brute-force wordlist not run (IP rate limit verified instead).
Multi-server WebSocket / Redis pub-sub not in scope.
